Do your best impression of a celebrity for 30 seconds.
Let the group give you a new hairstyle for the next 10 minutes.
Text your crush or a random contact: 'I think you are amazing.'
Do 20 push-ups right now.
Speak in an accent chosen by the group for the next 3 rounds.
Call a family member and sing Happy Birthday even if it is not their birthday.
Let someone go through your camera roll for 30 seconds.
Do your best dance move in the middle of the room.
Say the alphabet backwards as fast as you can.
Let the group post a status on your behalf on any social media.
Eat a spoonful of the spiciest thing available.
Talk like a robot for the next 5 minutes.
Do your best impression of the person to your left.
Compliment every person in the room in 60 seconds.
Call a random contact and tell them you have been thinking about them.
Do your best catwalk across the room.
Wear socks on your hands for the next 3 rounds.
Speak only in questions for the next 3 rounds.
Let someone draw on your face with a washable marker.
Do your best air guitar solo for a full minute.
Hold a plank for 1 minute.
Tell a joke — if nobody laughs, do 10 jumping jacks.
Post a funny selfie with a ridiculous caption to a social media story.
Swap shoes with the person next to you for the next round.
Close your eyes and let someone feed you a mystery snack.
Narrate everything you do for the next 3 minutes like a nature documentary.
Do the worm across the floor.
Give a dramatic 1-minute speech about why pizza is the best food.
Let the group rename your phone contacts for 5 of them.
Try to lick your elbow.
Sing the chorus of any song chosen by the group.
Talk without closing your mouth (like a ventriloquist) for 2 minutes.
Do your funniest impression of an animal for 30 seconds.
Pretend to be a waiter and take everyone's order in a fancy accent.
Text the 5th person in your contacts a random compliment.
Do 15 squats while saying the name of every person in the room.
Let someone style your hair however they want for the next 10 minutes.
Speak in slow motion for 2 rounds.
Moonwalk across the room.
Do your best stand-up comedy routine for 1 minute.
Pretend to be a news anchor and read out the last text you received.
Only respond to your new nickname (chosen by the group) for 3 rounds.
Do 10 star jumps while yelling 'I am amazing!'
Smell everyone's shoes and rank them from best to worst.
Act out a scene from your favourite movie.
Put ice cubes in your shirt for 30 seconds.
Balance a book on your head and walk across the room.
Let the group pick a word you must use in every sentence for the next 5 minutes.
Do your best impression of a movie villain.
Talk backwards for 2 minutes.
